When I'm in Managua, I've visited the Linda Vista branch, and the service is excellent. Today, February 4th, I visited the Granada branch, and unfortunately, the service from the young woman was terrible. She had a very bad attitude. I regularly go to the Granada fitness center, and today I wanted to check out the Royal Gym Granada branch to see if I should switch, but I'll stay with the same gym. Me llamó la atención que hay una política de respeto hacia las mujeres, lo cual siento que de los gimnasios que he asistido en Nicaragua, es el único lugar donde se cumple. Asimismo, recientemente se extendió más las áreas para dar más servicios como ejercicios con cuerdas, elípticas, funcional, y canchas de basquetbol. Increíble y excepcional, y los precios son bastante bajos. Así como han reordenado para brindar una mejor atención. Excelente servicio.

I've had the opportunity to start at Fit Factor a few weeks ago, and I've seen a pretty tight-knit team of trainers.  Also, I have observed how they take their work very seriously.  It caught my attention that there is a policy to respect women at all costs. Many gyms I have attended in Nicaragua, it is the only place where it is complied with.  Likewise, the areas were recently extended to provide more services such as exercises with ropes, elliptical, functional, and basketball courts.  Incredible and exceptional, and the prices are quite low.  Just as they have rearranged to provide better care.  Excellent service.

Tive a oportunidade de começar no Fit Factor há algumas semanas e vi uma equipe de treinadores bastante unida.  Além disso, observei como eles levam seu trabalho muito a sério.  Chamou-me a atenção que existe uma política de respeito à mulher, que sinto ser a das academias que frequentei na Nicarágua, é o único lugar onde ela é cumprida.  Da mesma forma, as áreas foram recentemente ampliadas para oferecer mais serviços como exercícios com cordas, elíptico, funcional e quadras de basquete.  Incrível e excepcional, e os preços são bastante baixos.  Assim como eles se reorganizaram para oferecer um atendimento melhor. Cuenta con una área para realizar ejercicios de calistenia/yoga/pilates/core, lo que quieras, pero es una área libre y esto para mí es lo mejor porque no todos los gimnasios cuentan con eso y es súper importante para poder estirar luego de tu ejercicio y evitar lesiones!
En tanto a los baños, estaban limpios y amplios! Incluso había una secadora para cabello!!
De parqueo ni hablemos porque hay muchos espacios para parquearte.

Por el precio que pagas está muy bien. Yo pagué $5 por el día pero la promoción del mes está mucho mejor porque son $32 al mes, si no me equivoco.
En fin, lo recomiendo un montón si lo que deseas es entrenar de manera completa y sin problemas de espacio, ambiente o limpieza.","text_translated":"I'd heard a lot about this gym and a few days ago I decided to give it a try. After going to gym after gym all over Managua, I think this is the best of them all. By that I mean it has a wide variety of machines, strategically arranged so you can do your upper and lower body workouts in the most comfortable way.
It's kept super clean. The air conditioning is a plus because with this heat, it's nice to exercise in a cool environment.
It has an area for calisthenics/yoga/pilates/core exercises—whatever you want—but it's an open area, which is the best part for me because not all gyms have that, and it's super important to be able to stretch after your workout and avoid injuries! As for the bathrooms, they were clean and spacious! There was even a hair dryer! And the parking is fantastic—there are plenty of spaces.

For the price, it's excellent. I paid $5 for the day, but the monthly promotion is much better at $32 a month, if I'm not mistaken.

Anyway, I highly recommend it if you want a complete workout without any issues with space, environment, or cleanliness.","published_at":"2025-06-12T23:03:02.329434Z"}]
